chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Constitutional Petition No.S-434 of 2024 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Petitioner: Ms. Sumaira d/o Late Qurban Ali through Mr.Sajid Hussain Soomro, Advocate Respondent No.1: Learned Civil/Guardian Judge-VII, Hyderabad Respondent No.2: Learned Model Civil Appellate court-II/6th Additional District Judge, Hyderabad Through Mr.Wali Muhammad Jamari, A.A.G Respondent No.3: General Public at Lage. Nemo. Date of hearing: 27.10.2025 Date of decision: 11.11.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J: For reasons to be recorded, the above- titled petition is allowed, the two impugned Orders, namely (i) Order dated 26.09.2025 passed by the VIth Addl District Judge Hyderabad in Family Appeal No.102/2024, and (ii) Order dated 18.07.2024 passed by the VIIth Guardian Judge Hyderabad in Guardian Application No.497/2023, are set aside, and the subject matter of this petition is remanded to the VIIth Guardian Judge, Hyderabad, to be decided afresh. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
